---
title: "demonstrate_proof.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\contracts\demonstrate_proof.py"
loc: 26
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.80
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.75
---

## Intent
The `demonstrate_proof.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on demonstrate. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via demonstrate. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [compiler](file://compiler)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `demonstrate`
